scenes.title: Cover: The Hard Work Is Done
scenes.narration: There's a moment in every creative system when the tuning is finished, and everything after that becomes fast.
scenes.visual_prompt: Deep obsidian background with a slow, barely perceptible horizontal light sweep — like a beam crossing polished black marble. No clutter. No geometry. Pure atmosphere.
scenes.staging_notes: Open on pure black. After a beat of silence, the single line fades in at center with a serif or high-contrast geometric typeface — large, deliberate, weighted. The light sweep moves left to right underneath the text, giving it a subtle reveal glow. Hold long enough to breathe. The statement should feel like a curtain rising.

scenes.title: The System Is Tuned
scenes.narration: Getting a system truly dialed in, that's the invisible labor. The calibration, the iteration, the decisions nobody sees.
scenes.visual_prompt: Dark slate background, deep blue-charcoal gradient. Abstract visualization of a signal or waveform settling — chaotic at the left edge, smoothing into a clean, precise line at the right. Premium finish.
scenes.staging_notes: Three short phrases reveal one at a time, left-aligned or center-staggered, each with a subtle upward fade. Pacing should feel like each line has weight — not rapid-fire. The waveform or signal graphic animates in the background, going from noisy to clean, reinforcing the idea of tuning. Cool, controlled, elegant.

scenes.title: What That Work Unlocks
scenes.narration: But once it's tuned, something shifts. The output doesn't just work — it repeats.
scenes.visual_prompt: Near-black background with a warm, amber-gold accent. A single geometric form — a circle or a clean horizontal rule — pulses once and then stabilizes into a steady, confident glow. Minimal. Intentional.
scenes.staging_notes: The line arrives as a single reveal after a short pause — the contrast word 'repeats' should feel slightly heavier or brighter than the rest. The geometric pulse should happen just before the text lands, drawing the eye to center. The mood shifts here from effort to capability. Warm gold cuts into the cool palette for the first time.

scenes.title: Fast
scenes.visual_prompt: Full-bleed dark background. Single word treatment. High velocity feel — directional motion blur or a sharp horizontal streak entering frame from left.
scenes.staging_notes: This is a one-word kinetic beat. The word 'Fast.' slams in from the left edge, decelerates, and snaps to center. Short hold. The motion itself is the message. Think of a title card in a luxury automotive film. The impact should be felt, not explained. Keep it under two seconds of animation, then a brief hold.

scenes.title: Repeatable
scenes.visual_prompt: Dark background. The word appears three times in sequence — faint, medium, then full opacity — stacked or echoing in a slight offset to suggest rhythm and recurrence.
scenes.staging_notes: Echo or ghost effect: the word appears at low opacity, then again slightly shifted, then lands at full weight — communicating the idea of repetition through the animation itself. Cool, measured pacing. This is the counterpoint to the speed beat — steady, confident, almost inevitable.

scenes.title: Saleable
scenes.visual_prompt: Deep background, premium warm lighting. The word centers with a clean upward reveal, accompanied by a thin gold underline that draws itself left to right beneath the letterforms.
scenes.staging_notes: The gold underline draws itself in sync with or just after the word appears — turning a simple word into a signature moment. This is the commercial punch of the triptych. The underline should feel like a pen signing off on something. Warm, confident, closing energy.

scenes.title: The Triptych Together
scenes.narration: Fast. Repeatable. Saleable. That's not a promise — that's an output.
scenes.visual_prompt: Dark premium background. Three words arranged horizontally at center — evenly spaced, same typeface weight as the individual beats. A thin horizontal rule connects them beneath, reinforcing unity.
scenes.staging_notes: Each word fades or slides in sequentially — echoing the prior solo beats — then all three settle together. After a breath, the connecting rule draws itself beneath all three. This is the synthesis moment. The rule is gold or bright white. Hold the full composition for a beat. The narration should land on 'output' just as the rule completes.

scenes.title: Not a Promise — A System
scenes.narration: Most creative tools ask you to trust the process. This one has already proven it.
scenes.visual_prompt: Cool dark slate background. Two short lines of text, center-aligned, with distinct typographic contrast — the first line in a lighter weight, the second in a heavier, more resolved weight.
scenes.staging_notes: First line appears in a lighter gray or medium weight — questioning, unresolved. Second line arrives beneath it in full white or gold, heavier and final. The shift in visual weight mirrors the narrative shift from doubt to proof. Clean, confident layout. No graphics. The typography alone carries it.
on_screen_text: Most tools ask you to trust the process.
This one has already proven it.

scenes.title: What Real Business Readiness Looks Like
scenes.narration: For founders, ready doesn't mean promising. It means the system runs, the output ships, and the economics hold.
scenes.visual_prompt: Dark background, warm ambient glow at center. Three short horizontal rows reveal sequentially — each a concise label. Clean, minimal, no decorative clutter.
scenes.staging_notes: Each line fades in with a slight left-to-right reveal, one at a time, with a short pause between each. These should feel like checkmarks being placed — quiet, assured, methodical. No icons or checkboxes needed; the pacing creates the effect. Warm, grounded tone to contrast with the kinetic energy of earlier beats.

scenes.title: The Invisible Advantage
scenes.narration: The advantage isn't visible in a single output. It's in what the tenth output looks like — and the hundredth.
scenes.visual_prompt: Dark premium background with a subtle upward gradient. A sequence of three identical abstract shapes appears — first one, then a second beside it, then a third — each marginally crisper and more refined than the last. Suggests compounding quality.
scenes.staging_notes: Three instances of the same abstract form — a card, a frame, a rectangle — appear left to right, each one subtly brighter or cleaner than the last. Labels appear beneath each one in sequence. This is a visual argument for compounding consistency. Cool, precise motion. The progression should feel inevitable, not triumphant.

scenes.title: The Statement
scenes.narration: When the system is genuinely ready, you stop selling the potential. You start selling the work.
scenes.visual_prompt: Near-black background. A single bold statement centered, large typeface, generous line-height. Warm gold or bright white. Nothing else in the frame.
scenes.staging_notes: First line fades in at medium weight — contemplative, diagnostic. Then 'Sell the work.' arrives below it, larger or bolder, as a clean command. This is the emotional peak of the video. Hold it. Let the narration land fully before any transition. The contrast in weight between the two lines should be the most dramatic typographic moment in the piece.

scenes.title: Closing: The Work Speaks
scenes.narration: The hard work was getting here. Everything from here is the reward.
scenes.visual_prompt: Return to the opening aesthetic — deep obsidian, the slow horizontal light sweep — but now the atmosphere feels settled rather than anticipatory. The frame is resolved.
scenes.staging_notes: Mirror the opening scene's visual language intentionally — same dark palette, same light sweep — but this time the sweep moves more slowly and the text arrives with more ease, less tension. The bracket is closed. The line fades in at center, holds fully, then the frame gently fades to black. The final word 'reward' should be the last thing visible before the fade completes.
on_screen_text: Everything from here is the reward.
